title: Buying a Birthday Cake 买生日蛋糕
scene: Tom去蛋糕店给妈妈订生日蛋糕。

lines.en: Hello! I want to order a birthday cake, please.
lines.zh: 你好！我想订一个生日蛋糕。

lines.en: Of course! When do you need it?
This Saturday. It's for my mom's birthday.
lines.zh: 这个周六。是我妈妈的生日。

lines.en: How nice! What flavor would you like?
Mom loves chocolate. Can I have a chocolate cake?
lines.zh: 妈妈喜欢巧克力。能要巧克力蛋糕吗？

lines.en: Absolutely! What size? For how many people?
lines.zh: 当然！要多大的？几个人吃？

lines.en: For about eight people. A medium size, please.
lines.zh: 大约八个人。请要中号的。

lines.en: Do you want any words written on the cake?
Yes, please write 'Happy Birthday, Mom! Love you!'
lines.zh: 是的，请写"妈妈生日快乐！爱你！"

lines.en: No problem! It will be ready by Saturday morning. That's one hundred and twenty yuan.
lines.zh: 没问题！周六早上能做好。一百二十元。
